tluaTableSyntaxErrors.tlua(2,17): error TS1109: Expression expected.
tluaTableSyntaxErrors.tlua(3,21): error TS1109: Expression expected.
tluaTableSyntaxErrors.tlua(7,13): error TS2364: The left-hand side of an assignment expression must be a variable or a property access.
tluaTableSyntaxErrors.tlua(8,13): error TS2364: The left-hand side of an assignment expression must be a variable or a property access.
tluaTableSyntaxErrors.tlua(11,13): error TS1136: Property assignment expected.
tluaTableSyntaxErrors.tlua(12,19): error TS1136: Property assignment expected.


==== tluaTableSyntaxErrors.tlua (6 errors) ====
    // Missing values: natural expression-expected errors.
    local a = { x = };
                    ~
!!! error TS1109: Expression expected.
    local b = { ["k"] = };
                        ~
!!! error TS1109: Expression expected.
    
    // Literal string/number keys must use the bracket form (`["s"] = 1`,
    // `[1] = 2`): a bare string/number key is a natural recovery error.
    local c = { "s" = 1 };
                ~~~
!!! error TS2364: The left-hand side of an assignment expression must be a variable or a property access.
    local d = { 1 = 2 };
                ~
!!! error TS2364: The left-hand side of an assignment expression must be a variable or a property access.
    
    // Stray separators: natural recovery errors.
    local e = { ; };
                ~
!!! error TS1136: Property assignment expected.
    local f = { g = 1;; h = 2 };
                      ~
!!! error TS1136: Property assignment expected.
